violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Chicken was observed held at 119 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The hoods in the kitchen area has an accumulation of grease and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Per interview with PIC, service is to take place next week. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen area is in poor repair, observed peeling paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Strainer was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ingredient containers, cutting board) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Fish and taquito's was observed held at 97-108 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Chemicals were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles in the front kitchen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Dishes and utensils were observed stored in the mop sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ingredient shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen area is in poor repair, inspector observed peeling paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The hoods in the kitchen area have an accumulation of grease buildup and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The doorway in the kitchen is lacking a complete seal, observed exposed wood. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2025

The walls in the mop sink area are constructed of dry wall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the reach-in refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the dining room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2025
The doorway does not have coving, observed exposed wood. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2025
